div.h1: Data Flow: Poison Message to DLQ
div.p: NACK with retry=max → DLQ persistence pipeline

ul.li: [x] Commit original offset to Main Topic
Panic or Backoff based on policy
ConsumerGroup: Must not block heartbeats during DLQ write.
DLQManager: Must ensure topic existence before write.
LogWriter: Use O_APPEND and pre-allocate file space to minimize fragmentation.
CRC32: Must use IEEE polynomial for compatibility.

g.text: DLQManager.MoveToDLQ(topic: string, offset: uint64, payload: []byte, retries: int, reason: string, id: string)
